'''Plaan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he was the chief of security on [[Tholatin]]. He later was first mate on the ''[[Sweet Surprise]]'', and encountered [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] on [[Nova Station]] looking for someone to pilot refugees to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Plaan indeed went to Coruscant to deliver refugees, but aboard the ''Sweet Surprise'' he also carried at least four [[voxyn]]. Nevertheless the voxyn were captured by Han and Leia Solo, with help from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], before they were unleashed on Coruscant.

{{Char-stub}}
